items.title: 3. Lataa

items.title: Privacy
items.description: Files stay on your device. Nothing is uploaded.

items.title: No limits
items.description: Convert as many files as you need.

items.title: Quality control
items.description: Adjust WebP quality with the slider.

items.title: Bulk download

items.question: GIF → WebP?
items.answer: Vie GIF-kuvan ensimmainen ruutu kevyena WebP-kuvana. Pienempi tiedosto, nopeampi lataus.

items.question: Server upload?
items.answer: No. Everything runs locally in your browser. Files never leave your device.

items.question: Multiple files?
items.answer: Yes. Add as many files as you like. No limits.

contentBlocks.title: Auta meitä parantamaan tyokaluja
contentBlocks.description: Onko sinulla idea, loysitko virheen tai haluatko ehdottaa toimintoa? Kirjoita meille - vastaamme 24 tunnin kuluessa.
